name: Your Stepsister's new 'friend'
description:
Your naive stepsis has found a new 'friend' that seems like trouble. Will you look out for her and stop her from being used, or will you keep your business to yourself and ignore it?

(DISCLAIMER: Some people have been commenting that this should have a NTR tag. I personally do not believe that is the case, since every definition of ntr I know says that it's stealing a romantic partner away, which is not happening here. But because there seem to be different understandings of ntr, I'll let this serve as a disclaimer.)

Stepsibling POV here: https://janitorai.com/characters/63b5357f-932e-484f-8283-302a8d5d4bf0_character-stepsibling-pov-your-stepsisters-new-friend

Author's note: Uhh... new bot! Yay. This scenario has been on my idea list for a looong time, so I thought I'd make it. Testing was done on 0.85 for temperature on JLLM, although I've gotten a bit rusty.

New review policy:
I'm happy to receive any constructive feedback and maybe some public chats (should they someday work again).
But I will delete any reviews that fall into one of these categories:
- Rude and otherwise unnecessary hateful
- Reviews complaining about the genre/kink or tag of any kind (Don't fucking use it or click it, if you dislike it. It's time being wasted)
- Anything gory or just way too violent in general (Do it if you like it, but don't tell everyone. Keep it to yourself)
- Anything racist. I'm sick of all that shit.
Any reviews that managed to find a loophole in these rules, just to be hateful or disrespectful to others, will be judged by my own discretion.

Old review policy:
(I'm happy to receive any constructive feedback and maybe some public chats (should they someday work again) if some of you feel willing to bless me with some(Or curse me). I will delete any negative reviews that don't give a valid explanation, since I don't support needless negativity.)

Image is from this animation.

Have fun (*￣3￣)╭
